title: Add HMAC auth to sweech daemon HTTP API
description: Daemon binds to 127.0.0.1:7801 with zero auth. /run executes model requests against the user keys — any local process (Docker, browser extension, sibling CLI) can drain quota. Loopback is not a security boundary on multi-user macOS.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 1: "Daemon loopback ≠ auth. /run executes model runs against the user's keys with zero auth on 127.0.0.1:7801"

acceptanceCriteria: ~/.sweech/daemon.secret generated with 0600 perms on first daemon start
Non-trivial endpoints (/run, /select, mutating routes) require HMAC of method+path+body signed with that secret
sweech CLI signs automatically — no user friction
/health and /healthz remain unauthenticated for orchestrator probes
Curl from another local process without the secret returns 401
